name: MSA Zip Codes level Performance and Rating

content.query:
SELECT
zipPerf.[Division]
,[EntryMonth]
,zipPerf.[ZipCode]
,[LeadSubSourceID]
,[ProductID]
,[BranchID]
,[LeadCount]
,[ProspectCount]
,[ApptSet]
,[NetIssue]
,[Demo]
,[NetSold]
,[NetSalesAmount]
,[GrossSalesAmount]
,[JobCount]
,zipPerf.[City]
,zipPerf.[County]
,zipPerf.[CBSA_Name]
,zipPerf.[MSA_Name]
,zipPerf.[State]
,[Total_Households]
,[Pct_Households_Entry_Level]
,[Pct_Households_Feature_And_Location]
,[Pct_Households_Simple_Life]
,[Pct_Households_Family_Life]
,[Pct_Households_Elite]
,[Pct_Households_AA_Entry_Level]
,[Pct_Households_AA_Feature_And_Location]
,[Pct_Households_AA_Elite]
,[Pct_Households_Renters]
,[Median_Home_Price]
,[Median_Year_Built]
,[Overall_Remodeling_Activity_Index]
,[Overall_Remodeling_Composite_Ranking_Index]
,[Baths_Activity_Index]
,[Baths_Composite_Ranking_Index]
,[Windows_Activity_Index]
,[Windows_Composite_Ranking_Index]
,[PopulationEstimate]
,[PersonsPerHousehold]
,[AverageHouseValue]
,[IncomePerHousehold]
,[MedianAge]
,[DeliveryResidential]
,[DeliveryBusiness]
,[DeliveryTotal]
,[ClassificationCode]
,[MultiCounty]
,[LandArea]
,[WaterArea]
,[BoxCount]
,[SFDU] as SingleFamilyDwellingUints
,[MFDU] as MultiFamilyDwellingUnits
 FROM 
 [ODS].[MKTDATA_ZIP_CODES_DB_DELUXE_BUSINESS] zip
 inner join [EDW].[SUMM_FACT_ZIP_CODE_PERFORMANCE] zipPerf
 on zipPerf.ZipCode = zip.ZipCode 
left join ODS.MKTDATA_ZONDA_ZIP_CODE_INDEX zonda
on zipPerf.ZipCode = zonda.ZipCode
 where 
 zip.PrimaryRecord = 'P'
 and zip.MSA_Name in (
'Greenville-Spartanburg-Anderson SC MSA', 
'Charlotte-Gastonia-Rock Hill NC-SC MSA', 
'Columbia SC MSA',
'Raleigh-Durham-Chapel Hill NC MSA',
'Knoxville TN MSA',
'Charleston-North Charleston SC MSA'
 )
 order by MSA_NAME, [NetSalesAmount] desc
